iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 16:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear signals. Iran reveals 42K+ civilian sites damaged. Trump threatens Kharg Island strikes “just for fun” — escalatory rhetoric but no nuclear dimension. Space Research Centre severely damaged. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 18:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). FM Araghchi tells CBS: 'We never asked for ceasefire... ready for long war.' IRGC 52nd wave ongoing. Israel expands Isfahan strikes. Trump says allies responded to Hormuz call but none confirmed. 6 US troops identified from KC-135 crash. IEA commits 400M barrel oil release. 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 16:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). 4 killed overnight in Lebanon strikes. West Bank family killing (2 children, 2 adults) already captured. Sirens in central Israel from Iranian barrages. 826+ killed in Lebanon. 100 (capped, rising).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. Erdogan vows Turkey “will not be dragged into Iran war.” 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED RISING. No new India-specific developments. Watching Pak-Afghan escalation. 25 (rising).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Russia-ME developments. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. US-China trade talks open in Paris (AP), paving way for Trump-Xi summit. Slight de-escalation. 11 (stable).

north_korea.notes: Day 16 18:04 — CRITICAL RISING. Kim Jong Un oversees test-launch of 12x 600mm nuclear-capable multiple rocket launchers (Reuters/KCNA). Kim Ju Ae in attendance. 3rd provocation in a week. Response to Freedom Shield drills. 55 (rising).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 16:04 — IMMINENT RISING. Russia launches 68 missiles + 282 guided bombs + 9,222 drones in 24h. 740 Russian personnel lost. 144 combat engagements. Ukraine intercepts 90/97 overnight drones. Poland scrambles jets. Moldova drone intrusion. US paused ceasefire talks. Ukraine assesses negotiation viability in 1-2 weeks. 81 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 17:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facilities. 115K+ displaced. No ceasefire signals. Operation Ghazb lil Haq expanding. 99 (capped, rising).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO DE-ESCALATION ON ANY FRONT (Day 16 18:04):
- Iran: FM Araghchi: 'Never asked for ceasefire... ready for long war.' IRGC 52nd wave. Israel expands Isfahan strikes. Zero diplomacy.
- DPRK: Kim Jong Un tests 12x nuclear-capable MRLs. 3rd provocation this week.
- Israel-Lebanon: 826+ killed. No ceasefire.
- Russia-Ukraine: US ceasefire talks stalled. Kyiv strike.
- Pakistan-Afghanistan: Pakistan strikes Kandahar. 115K displaced.
- China: US-China trade talks in Paris — only de-escalation signal globally.
- TEN trackers at imminent/critical. ONE de-escalation signal (China trade talks).

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi: 'We never asked for ceasefire' — ready for long war
latest_news.text: FM Araghchi on Face the Nation: 'We never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation. Ready to defend as long as it takes.' Refutes Trump claim Iran was 'ready to make a deal.'

latest_news.headline: Kim Jong Un oversees 12x 600mm nuclear-capable MRL test — 3rd provocation this week
latest_news.text: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un presided over drill of 12x 600mm-calibre multiple rocket launchers (nuclear-capable) with daughter Kim Ju Ae in attendance. Response to US-South Korea Freedom Shield exercises.

latest_news.headline: Israel expands strikes on western Iran — Isfahan province under heavy bombardment
latest_news.text: Israel announces barrage of new strikes on western Iran. Missiles hitting multiple sites across Isfahan province. Dozens reported killed. IRGC 52nd wave of retaliatory attacks ongoing.

latest_news.headline: Trump calls allies for Hormuz warships — UK says it has 'only one vessel'
latest_news.text: Trump urges countries benefiting from Gulf oil to send warships to Strait of Hormuz. No public commitments from allies. UK says Royal Navy has 'only one vessel' available. European defense ministries reportedly furious.

latest_news.headline: 6 US service members identified from KC-135 Stratotanker crash in Iraq
latest_news.text: Pentagon names 6 deceased from March 12 KC-135 refueling plane crash over western Iraq. Not hostile/fire cause — under investigation. Iranian proxy group claimed responsibility.

latest_news.headline: US-China trade talks open in Paris — paves way for Trump-Xi summit
latest_news.text: US and China open trade negotiations in Paris. Discussions pave the way for potential Trump-Xi summit. De-escalation signal amid global tensions.

latest_news.headline: IEA commits 400M barrel oil release to ease Iran war disruptions
latest_news.text: International Energy Agency member countries commit 400 million barrels for release. US contributes 172M, Europe 107.5M. barrels to be released by end of March.

latest_news.headline: IRGC vows to 'pursue and kill Netanyahu' — 52nd wave of True Promise 4
latest_news.text: Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps vows to pursue Israeli PM Netanyahu and kill him. 52nd wave of Operation True Promise 4 ongoing. Multiple missile barrages at Israel.

outlook:
CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 18:04). WAR ENTERS DAY 17 — MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): FM Araghchi: 'Never asked for ceasefire.' IRGC 52nd wave. Israel expands Isfahan strikes. Trump calls allies for Hormuz — no commitments. 6 US troops identified from crash. Zero diplomacy.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): IDF strikes Beirut suburbs. 826+ dead. No ceasefire.

(3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 86 (RISING): Kyiv strike. US ceasefire talks stalled. G7 rebukes sanctions waiver.

(4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped): Pakistan strikes Kandahar. 115K displaced.
(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77. (6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78.
(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 55 (RISING): Kim tests 12x nuclear-capable MRLs. 3rd provocation in a week.
(8) INDIA → ELEVATED 25.

ONE DE-ESCALATION SIGNAL: US-China trade talks open in Paris (Trump-Xi summit possible).

ZERO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS ON 7 OF 8 FRONT. Day 17 continues.
